race.description: Powerflo Solutions Summer Middle Distance Series Final Handicap (Bm70)
race.comment: Competitive affair but TIME ALLOWED (5) profiles very well third up. Two runs back have been strong, boxing on well behind the talented Astral Flame here over 1600m second up, beaten under a length. He hasn't been past a mile before but is bred to do so and could improve again here which would see him winning. MAKE IT SWEET (13) is going well without winning this time in, trying hard in the Wangaratta Cup last time out when fourth. She's been contesting some handy races and this suits. GREY ICE (1) won well here last time in a thinner race but did it well and can measure up again. POWERFUL TORQUE (4) draws for every chance having placed here last time. He won two in a row prior and can atone.
